name: Pair Bear Scare!!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>恐依</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おそろい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のペアルックマ！！
desc: Your opponent can reveal 1 "Pair Bear Scare!!" in their hand or Deck, and if they do, each player gains 2000 LP. Otherwise, you destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Add this card to your opponent's hand. You can only use this effect of "Pair Bear Scare!!" once per Duel. You can only activate 1 "Pair Bear Scare!!" per turn.
eff: Your opponent can reveal 1 "Pair Bear Scare!!" in their hand or Deck, and if they do, each player gains 2000 LP. Otherwise, you destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Add this card to your opponent's hand. You can only use this effect of "Pair Bear Scare!!" once per Duel. You can only activate 1 "Pair Bear Scare!!" per turn.

action: Reveals cards from your opponent's hand
Reveals cards from your opponent's Deck
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Adds itself from your Graveyard to your opponent's hand
